description: You are configuring GPredict for a university amateur radio club's new full-duplex satellite ground station. Configure a radio interface named 'FT-847_Duplex' (Host: localhost, Port: 4532, Rig Type: Duplex TRX) and a rotator interface named 'G-5500' (Host: localhost, Port: 4533). Create a tracking module named 'Linear_SSB' including satellites AO-7 (NORAD 7530), FO-29 (NORAD 24278), and FuncUBE-1 / AO-73 (NORAD 39444). The module layout must display only the Polar plot and Single-Satellite view with the world map hidden. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
